title: Content Shield - Economic Overview
description: Cost and efficiency metrics for content validation

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(cost_usd) as avg_cost FROM content_shield.events WHERE cost_usd IS NOT NULL
SELECT SUM(estimated_rework_saved_usd) as total_saved FROM content_shield.events WHERE NOT passed
SELECT agent_name, COUNT(*) as usage FROM content_shield.agent_calls GROUP BY agent_name
SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(timestamp, DAY) as day, SUM(cost_usd) as daily_cost FROM content_shield.events GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
